Update to 7.6

Update to 7.6

Changelog:
7.6
  * Added support for Garmin IMG maps.
  * Fixed coordinates info display issues.
  * Fixed rendering of large areas using OpenGL.
  * Fixed broken speed type switch.
7.5
  * Added support for geotagged JPEG images.
